task_completion.description: Navigate to the SEB Server login page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser is open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server login screen.
The SEB Server dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'CS101 Midterm' exam configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration page, edit screen, or policy list specifically for the exam named 'CS101 Midterm' is open.
The checkbox, toggle, or setting for 'Allow Downloads' (or 'allowDownloads') is checked, toggled on, or set to 'true' within the 'CS101 Midterm' configuration.
The checkbox, toggle, or setting for 'Allow Uploads' (or 'allowUploads') is checked, toggled on, or set to 'true' within the 'CS101 Midterm' configuration.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SEB Server web interface, not terminal commands (like curl or mysql) used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost:8080 and the application appears to be the genuine SEB Server, not a local text file or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially modify the DOM to show checked boxes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target exam configuration is explicitly named 'CS101 Midterm'. The agent must modify the settings corresponding to the database attributes 'allowDownloads' and 'allowUploads', setting them to 'true' (visually represented as enabled toggles or checked boxes in the SEB Server GUI).
